category_title: Eighth-grade students with ASD displaying low academic engagement and task avoidance in math
student_description: This is an eighth-grade student with ASD who struggles with task avoidance, verbal refusal, and low engagement in their general education math class. They uniquely require highly structured self-management checklists that explicitly embed both academic steps and behavioral expectations, alongside clearly visible reinforcers, to initiate and complete work.

criteria.rationale: Sustained engagement over weeks requires a predictable routine where the student knows their completed checklist will reliably result in the promised reinforcer.
criteria.check: The tutor's long-term plan must establish a consistent routine for the student to submit or review their completed checklist at the end of the session in exchange for their agreed-upon reinforcer.
